assertions.description: window.print exists as the baseline print-dialog fallback.
window.print is callable when the Web Printing API is unavailable.
If window.printing is exposed in an Isolated Web App, it provides WebPrintingManager.getPrinters().
Any discovered WebPrinter exposes cachedAttributes(), fetchAttributes(), and submitPrintJob().
Discovered printers expose basic cached attributes including printerName and an obfuscated printerId.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!('printing' in window))return true;return window.printing.getPrinters().then(printers=>{if(!printers.length)return true;const attrs=printers[0].cachedAttributes();return attrs&&typeof attrs.printerName==='string'&&typeof attrs.printerId==='string'&&/^[0-9a-f]{64}$/i.test(attrs.printerId);});})()

assertions.description: fetchAttributes() resolves to the detailed WebPrinterAttributes object when a printer is available.
assertions.test: (()=>{if(!('printing' in window))return true;return window.printing.getPrinters().then(async printers=>{if(!printers.length)return true;const attrs=await printers[0].fetchAttributes();return attrs&&typeof attrs==='object'&&('printerState' in attrs||'mediaSourceSupported' in attrs||'printColorModeSupported' in attrs);});})()

assertions.description: beforeprint event handler is supported by the baseline printing surface.
afterprint event handler is supported by the baseline printing surface.
